name: Complete Controller
description_short: Complete Controller provides outsourced bookkeeping and accounting services for small to mid-size Chicago businesses, handling monthly reconciliation, payroll coordination, and financial reporting.
description_long:
Complete Controller is an established bookkeeping and accounting services firm that has been serving Chicago-area businesses since 2008. The company positions itself as an alternative to hiring in-house bookkeeping staff, offering remote/cloud-based accounting support to small business owners, agencies, professional service firms, contractors, real estate investors, and hospitality businesses across the Chicago metropolitan area.

The company's service offerings include monthly bookkeeping and account reconciliation, accounts payable and receivable management, payroll coordination, QuickBooks Online setup and support, bookkeeping cleanup and catch-up services, management-level financial reporting, and virtual CFO/controller-level support. They emphasize unlimited financial document storage, cloud-based accessibility, and integration assistance with third-party applications. Pricing is structured as flat-rate packages scaled to transaction volume and business complexity rather than hourly billing.

Complete Controller differentiates itself through several specific claims: deep understanding of Chicago's business cycles and seasonal fluctuations, dedicated team assignment (not rotating accountants), integration with existing CPAs during tax season, no judgment approach to messy or behind bookkeeping files, and explicit positioning as more cost-effective than hiring full-time staff when factoring in wages, payroll taxes, software, and turnover. The company highlights 600+ five-star reviews and claims to serve a diverse mix of industry verticals.

Limitations are inherent to the service model: this is not business lending or capital financing—it's accounting services. The company does not appear to offer tax preparation, legal services, or strategic business consulting beyond controller-level reporting. The website lacks transparent pricing details, requiring consultation for quotes. As a service provider rather than a lending platform, Complete Controller does not fit the typical "business-loans" category of capital providers, though it may fall within the broader small business financing support ecosystem.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Flat-rate, predictable pricing with no surprise hourly overages, designed specifically for Chicago's cyclical business revenue patterns
Dedicated bookkeeping team assigned to each client with consistent, scheduled communication rather than rotating accountants
Proven track record serving Chicago since 2008 with 600+ five-star reviews across diverse industry verticals (agencies, healthcare, contractors, real estate, hospitality)
Explicit integration with clients' existing CPAs, particularly valuable during tax season, plus CPA referrals if clients lack one
Comprehensive cleanup and catch-up services for clients with messy or behind QuickBooks files, positioned as non-judgmental
Cloud-based QuickBooks Online support with unlimited document storage and secure remote access
Serves wide range of Chicago business types including startups, with scalable packages that can be upgraded or downgraded
cons: No transparent pricing on website; all quotes require consultation call, making budget comparison difficult for prospective clients
Positioning as replacement for in-house bookkeepers may not address clients who need actual business financing or capital access
Website lacks detail on response times, turnaround timelines for monthly reporting, or SLAs for financial delivery
Limited information on what happens if client needs services beyond bookkeeping (tax prep, payroll processing, compliance)
Service quality and reliability heavily dependent on assigned team; no information on backup support or service guarantees if team member leaves
best_for: Chicago small business owners (agencies, contractors, professional services, real estate investors) who lack in-house accounting capacity and want predictable monthly costs
Businesses with messy or behind QuickBooks files seeking cleanup and catch-up support before tax season
Growing companies with seasonal or project-based revenue fluctuations needing flexible, scalable accounting support
Business owners already working with a CPA who want clean books and outsourced monthly reconciliation to reduce tax preparer burden
diagnosis: Complete Controller is best for Chicago-area small business owners who need outsourced bookkeeping and accounting support rather than business financing. This is an accounting services provider, not a lender or capital provider—the 'business-loans' category is technically incorrect, though the company does support small business operations by reducing accounting overhead. Main caveat: pricing is non-transparent and requires direct consultation; this is not a loan product and does not provide capital access.
services: Accounts payable (AP) and accounts receivable (AR) management
Bookkeeping cleanup and catch-up services for behind/messy files
Unlimited financial document storage and organization
Cloud-based bookkeeping with secure remote access
CPA referrals and tax season support coordination
Custom flat-rate service packages scaled to business size and complexity
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 125 S Wacker Dr STE 300, Chicago, IL 60606
